creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
The port misc/raspberrypi-userland port has been deprecated in the official upstream Raspberry Pi repository (https://github.com/raspberrypi/userland) for nearly a year now. The Raspberry Pi platform has since fully transitioned to AARCH64. Unfortunately, this project can no longer be compiled, and the original contributor who initially ported the project has removed their support for it some time ago.

The upstream replacement project for this port can be found at https://github.com/raspberrypi/utils.

misc/raspberrypi-userland：has been deprecated and has long been unmaintained. It is recommended to delete it.

Additionally, it is important to mention that other Raspberry Pi-related software has also been left unmaintained for an extended period in FreeBSD.

I look forward to the continued efforts of more members of the community, and I extend my thanks to everyone involved.

Thanks a lot.
